Mayaru Moyaru at the Aftcastle wishes to tell you all there is to be told of the Moonfire Faire.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

Mayaru Moyaru at the Aftcastle wishes to tell you all there is to be told of the Moonfire Faire.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
Mayaru Moyaru tells you that the Moonfire Faire is being held on the Isle of Endless Summer. Travel to the isle in eastern La Noscea and learn more from the Faire's chaperone, Haermaga.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
